zh.Calverley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Claverley於大約1340年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Walter Calverley31歲，母親Margery Dyneley31歲。他於1401年與Joan Bigod結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年12月18日在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Claverley于大约1340年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，他的父亲Walter Calverley31岁，母亲Margery Dyneley31岁。他于1401年与Joan Bigod结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年12月18日在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾卡爾福利享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Claverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Clorley
meanings: English: locative name from Claverley (Shrops), recorded as Clorley in 1550.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Claverley was born about 1340, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Walter Calverley, was 31 and his mother, Margery Dyneley, was 31. He married Joan Bigod in 1401. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 18 December 1404, in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Claverley est né environ 1340, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter Calverley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery Dyneley, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bigod en 1401. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 18 décembre 1404, à Calverley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Claverley um 1340 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Calverley 31 und seine Mutter Margery Dyneley 31. Er hat 1401 Joan Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Dezember 1404 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Joan Bigod nel 1401. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 dicembre 1404, nel Calverley, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Claverleyが約1340年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Walter Calverleyは31歳，母Margery Dyneleyは31歳であった。1401年にJoan Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年12月18日にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Claverley(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Calverley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Dyneley(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1401년 Joan Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 12월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Bigod em 1401. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1404, em Calverley, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Claverley родился около 1340 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Calverley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Dyneley, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bigod в 1401 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 18 декабря 1404 г. в местности калвирли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.
